segments.text: That's what it comes down to, really
segments.original_text: 結局こういうところだよな

segments.text: How well they can move their character
segments.original_text: どんだけキャラ動かせるかが

segments.text: That's honestly the biggest part of this game
segments.original_text: やっぱ大部分占めると思うわこのゲーム

full_text: That's insane! That's what it comes down to, really. Playing however they want. How well they can move their character. That's honestly the biggest part of this game. Ouch!
